========================================
THERMAL PROTOCOL 
========================================
Pulse:        PD=0.020s, PRI=0.200s (DC=10.0%, PRF=5.0Hz)
Pulse Train:  PTD=0.20s = 1 pulses (1 ON + 1 OFF steps @ 0.02 s)
PTRI:         PTRI=0.2s (400 reps/PTD, PTRI-OFF=0.0s = 0 coarse steps @ 1.00s)
PTRD:         PTRD=80.0s s total sonication
Steady-state:     80s post-PTRD (80 steps @ 1.0s)
Simulation steps:  800 fine + 80 coarse = 880 total
